en: The teacher is here.

ab: jikamna mialilima, lisna kamna do ezsadan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: sinci 5 sicyaraw, ya miwalam simaraw, miyowyaw ta an!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: noon! mangay ta do pais no ayo.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: sinci 3 simaraw, mibozo ta simakoyab an!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: ikongo vazay mo do pepnezak simaraw?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: niciyo simaraw, yamen mi-ina am, yamangay do kyokay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: ko akmi ya mowtowta, ko mangay do o bowbotan.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, ya meyngen velek ko, mangay do o bowbotan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?

ab: yana makaykai rana miwalam, citai na am mangay ka.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, ya meyngen oo ko, miwala ko simakoyab.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: noon, makapiya ka mowli do vahay nyo.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, miwalam ko simaktey sinci 1, ko mangay do koysang.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Matnaw?

ab: ya meyngen velek na, ya amyan do obowbotan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Kaswal?

ab: sinsi, yameyngen tetehnan na niKaswal, ya miwalam sicaraw.
en: Teacher, Kaswal has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Matnaw come?
She has a fever.
